summary: Backend: 11/12 pytest passed. Frontend: All pages load; Dashboard, Compliance drilldowns, IMS decisions, Interest, Export all functional after state loads. Encryption verified (stored bytes differ from plaintext). One spec violation in Table 4D and two frontend robustness bugs found.

critical.issue: gstr3b['4']['4D'] is missing the required 'source_ids' field. Spec says each 4A/4B(1)/4B(2)/4D cell must contain igst/cgst/sgst/cess/source_ids/label. Only 4D omits source_ids (compliance.py build_gstr3b_table4). Even if 4D is derived, include an empty list for schema consistency.

minor.issue: COLUMN_ALIASES in services/ingestion.py does NOT include snake_case header variants (e.g., 'invoice_number', 'invoice_date', 'buyer_gstin' with underscores). Rows with such headers fail with 'Missing invoice number or taxable value' even though raw storage shows the values. Add snake_case forms to each alias list.

Clicking Upload page 'load a sample marketplace CSV' button consistently results in job status='exception' with 'Done — 0 invoices, 2 exceptions'. Review requested progressing/complete status. Root cause likely inside parse_marketplace_file (see /app/backend/services/ingestion.py) — 3-row sample yields 0 invoices, indicating either LineItem construction failure or invoice_type/taxable_value edge case with 'Buyer State' names.

ui_bugs.issue: Runtime crash 'Objects are not valid as a React child (found: object with keys {type, loc, msg, input, url})' when export button is clicked before AppState finishes loading (sellerGstin=null). Backend returns 422 with detail as array of pydantic error objects; toast.error(e.response.data.detail) passes that array to sonner which renders it as React child and errors overlay is shown. Fix: (a) disable export buttons while state.loading is true, and (b) always coerce API error to string, e.g., typeof detail==='string' ? detail : JSON.stringify(detail).

React hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>'. Emergent dynamic wrapper injects a <span> inside <option> which is invalid HTML. Consider using plain text expression without dynamic wrapping for the option label (AppShell.jsx line 78).

integration_issues.issue: Job for sample CSV shows exception status instead of complete (see backend minor bug above). Testids and refresh flow work correctly.

action_items: Add 'source_ids' key (even if empty list) to Table 4D in services/compliance.build_gstr3b_table4 to satisfy the schema spec.
In services/ingestion.COLUMN_ALIASES add snake_case variants (invoice_number, invoice_date, buyer_gstin) so uploads with those exact headers parse successfully.
Debug why the frontend SAMPLE_CSV (Upload.jsx line 184) fails parsing — 3 rows produce 0 invoices; check LineItem construction/validation and inspect job exception messages.

Fix ExportPage crash: disable Generate buttons while useAppState.loading=true, and stringify pydantic 422 detail arrays before passing to toast.error (apply same defensive coercion in Compliance/IMS/Upload where 'e?.response?.data?.detail' is directly toasted).
Remove or bypass the dynamic <span> wrapper inside <option> in AppShell seller-select to eliminate the hydration warning.
critical_code_review_comments: services/compliance.py build_gstr3b_table4 returns 4D without source_ids — inconsistent schema shape breaks strict consumers of the preview API.

Multiple frontend pages call toast.error(e?.response?.data?.detail || 'msg'). FastAPI validation errors return `detail` as an array of objects, not a string — causes sonner/React child crash. Wrap with a helper (e.g., extractErr(e)) that stringifies non-string details.
AppStateProvider does not gate route content on loading; pages render with sellerGstin=null on first paint, allowing API calls with empty query params that return 422.
Ingestion COLUMN_ALIASES only supports lowercase-with-spaces variants — real e-comm CSVs from Amazon MTR often use snake_case; missing coverage limits ingestion robustness.
Upload.jsx SAMPLE_CSV uses invoice dates that may be outside the selected period (uses today's date) — could confuse period-scoped listings if user is filing for a past period.

success_rate.frontend: 80% (5/6 pages fully functional; ExportPage crashes on race condition)

test_credentials: N/A — single-tenant demo, no auth in v1.
seed_data_creation: POST /api/seed/demo confirmed idempotent (2 runs → same counts 5/3/2). Seller 29ABCDE1234F1Z5 for current period auto-created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (pytest, uses current YYYY-MM as period). Known failing test: test_compliance_preview_structure asserts 4D.source_ids exists (spec requirement) — will pass once compliance.py fix lands. IMS accept on the amendment CN was already fired during this iteration, so 4B(2) reversal will already be non-zero; re-seed via POST /api/seed/demo before re-running IMS tests.
rca of the issue: 1) 4D missing source_ids — compliance.build_gstr3b_table4 constructs 4D from arithmetic totals and doesn't set source_ids key. 2) Export page crash — FastAPI returns 422 with detail=[{type,loc,msg,input,url}, ...] when sellerGstin query param is empty; frontend passes that array to toast.error → sonner renders as React child → 'Objects are not valid as React child' overlay. 3) Sample CSV exception — ingestion alias resolver + LineItem construction path yields no invoices for the frontend-generated sample; needs backend log inspection during upload.
